```{r annual-trends-figure}
  scale_linetype_identity() +
  scale_size_continuous(range=c(2,5),name="N encounters") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(yr_min,yr_max,by=1)) +
  facet_wrap(~drug_label_f,scales="free_y",ncol=2) +
  labs(title="A \u2014 Median Induction Dose Over Time",x=NULL,y="Dose (mg/kg)") +
  theme_pilot() + theme(legend.position="none",axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))

pB_fig <- ggplot(drug_choice_yr_fig,aes(x=calendar_year,y=pct,fill=drug_label_f)) +
  geom_col(position="stack",width=0.7,colour="white",linewidth=0.3) +
  geom_hline(yintercept=50,linetype="dashed",colour="#888888",linewidth=0.6) +
  scale_fill_manual(values=drug_colours,labels=drug_labels,name="Drug") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(yr_min,yr_max,by=1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=function(x) paste0(x,"%"),limits=c(0,101),expand=c(0,0)) +
  labs(title="B \u2014 Drug Choice Over Time",x="Calendar year",y="% of encounters") +
  theme_pilot() + theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=45,hjust=1))

p_annual_fig <- pA_fig/pB_fig +
  plot_annotation(title="Annual Dose and Drug Choice Trends",caption=site_caption,
    theme=theme(plot.title=element_text(face="bold",size=15,colour="#1F3864"),
                plot.caption=element_text(size=9,colour="#888888",hjust=0)))

ggsave(out_fig("fig_annual_trends.png"),plot=p_annual_fig,width=12,height=10,dpi=180)
p_annual_fig
```

```{r location-comparisons}
df %>% group_by(drug,location_group) %>%
  summarise(n=n(),dose_mgkg_median=median(dose_mg_kg,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mgkg_q1=quantile(dose_mg_kg,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mgkg_q3=quantile(dose_mg_kg,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mgkg_sd=sd(dose_mg_kg,na.rm=TRUE),
            pct_reduced=mean(dose_reduced==1,na.rm=TRUE)*100,.groups="drop") %>%
  mutate(site_id=SITE_ID) %>% write_csv(out_fig("dose_by_location.csv"))

df %>% count(location_group,drug) %>%
  group_by(location_group) %>% mutate(total=sum(n),pct=n/total*100) %>%
  ungroup() %>% mutate(site_id=SITE_ID) %>% write_csv(out_fig("drug_choice_by_location.csv"))

# Table 3
df %>% group_by(drug,hospital_type,location_group) %>%
  summarise(n=n(),
            dose_mgkg_median=median(dose_mg_kg,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mgkg_q1=quantile(dose_mg_kg,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mgkg_q3=quantile(dose_mg_kg,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mg_median=median(induction_dose_mg,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mg_q1=quantile(induction_dose_mg,0.25,na.rm=TRUE),
            dose_mg_q3=quantile(induction_dose_mg,0.75,na.rm=TRUE),
            pct_tier_reduced=mean(dose_tier=="reduced",na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_tier_int_reduced=mean(dose_tier=="intermediate_reduced",na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_tier_int_full=mean(dose_tier=="intermediate_full",na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_tier_full=mean(dose_tier=="full",na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_reduced_thresh=mean(dose_reduced==1,na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_low25=mean(dose_low_25pct==1,na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_vaso_6hr=mean(any_vasopressor_6hrs_prior==1,na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            pct_ase=mean(ASE_7d_prior==1,na.rm=TRUE)*100,
            n_miss_dose_mgkg=sum(is.na(dose_mg_kg)),
            n_miss_sbp_24hr=sum(is.na(worst_sbp_24hr_pre)),
            n_miss_sbp_6hr=sum(is.na(worst_sbp_6hr_pre)),
            .groups="drop") %>%
  mutate(site_id=SITE_ID) %>% write_csv(out_tbl("table3_dose_by_strata.csv"))

cat("Location comparison exports complete.\n")
```

```{r time-trend-model}
df_trend <- df %>% mutate(year = calendar_year_c)
include_hosp_type <- n_distinct(df_trend$hospital_type, na.rm=TRUE) > 1

trend_formula <- if (!single_hosp_site & include_hosp_type) {
  as.integer(drug=="ketamine") ~ year + hospital_type + (1 | hospital_id)
} else if (!single_hosp_site) {
  as.integer(drug=="ketamine") ~ year + (1 | hospital_id)
} else if (include_hosp_type) {
  as.integer(drug=="ketamine") ~ year + hospital_type
} else {
  as.integer(drug=="ketamine") ~ year
}

trend_model <- tryCatch(
  if (!single_hosp_site) {
    glmer(trend_formula, data=df_trend, family=binomial,
          control=glmerControl(optimizer="bobyqa"))
  } else {
    glm(trend_formula, data=df_trend, family=binomial)
  },
  error=function(e){cat("  Time trend model failed:",conditionMessage(e),"\n");NULL}
)

if (!is.null(trend_model)) {
  tidy(trend_model, effects="fixed", exponentiate=TRUE, conf.int=TRUE) %>%
    mutate(site_id=SITE_ID, model="drug_choice_time_trend",
           model_type=case_when(
             !single_hosp_site & include_hosp_type ~ "multi-hosp + hospital_type",
             !single_hosp_site                     ~ "multi-hosp, no hospital_type",
             include_hosp_type                     ~ "single-hosp + hospital_type (glm)",
             TRUE                                  ~ "single-hosp, year only (glm)")) %>%
    { write_csv(., out_mod("time_trend_model_results.csv")); . } %>%
    knitr::kable(digits=3, caption="Time trend model: drug choice ~ year")
}
```

---

# Section 8 — Final Exports and Run Summary

```{r site-metadata}
tibble(
  site_id              = SITE_ID,
  n_total              = nrow(df),
  n_etomidate          = sum(df$drug=="etomidate"),
  n_ketamine           = sum(df$drug=="ketamine"),
  n_hospitals          = n_hospitals,
  n_hospitals_re       = n_hospitals_re,
  n_providers          = n_distinct(df$provider_id),
  n_providers_re       = n_providers_re,
  single_hosp_site     = single_hosp_site,
  imputation_method    = imputation_method,
  date_range_years     = paste(min(df$calendar_year,na.rm=TRUE),
                               max(df$calendar_year,na.rm=TRUE),sep="-"),
  script_version       = "v0.9_6hr",
  run_datetime         = format(Sys.time(),"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"),
  r_version            = as.character(getRversion()),
  lme4_version         = as.character(packageVersion("lme4")),
  lmm_etomidate_model_type = if(!is.null(lmm_etomidate)) lmm_etomidate$variance_components$model_type[1] else NA_character_,
  lmm_ketamine_model_type  = if(!is.null(lmm_ketamine))  lmm_ketamine$variance_components$model_type[1]  else NA_character_,
  lmm_etomidate_singular   = if(!is.null(lmm_etomidate)) any(is.na(lmm_etomidate$variance_components$ci_lo)) else NA,
  lmm_ketamine_singular    = if(!is.null(lmm_ketamine))  any(is.na(lmm_ketamine$variance_components$ci_lo))  else NA
) %>% { write_csv(., out_diag("site_metadata.csv")); . } %>%
  knitr::kable(caption="Site metadata")
```

```{r file-checklist}
expected_files <- list(
  list(f="02_cohort_summary.csv",              fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_missingness_raw.csv",             fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_impossible_values.csv",           fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_exclusion_waterfall.csv",         fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_provider_encounter_dist.png",     fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_provider_encounter_table.csv",    fn=out_diag),
  list(f="01_missing_weight.csv",              fn=out_diag),
  list(f="02_derived_variable_checks.csv",     fn=out_diag),
  list(f="02_missingness_analytic.csv",        fn=out_diag),
  list(f="site_metadata.csv",                  fn=out_diag),
  list(f="table1_by_drug.csv",                 fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="table1_missingness.csv",             fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="table1_icu_type.csv",                fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="dose_tier_counts.csv",               fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="dose_categorical_counts.csv",        fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="hospital_dose_summary.csv",          fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="provider_dose_summary.csv",          fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="03_provider_drug_choice_summary.csv",fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="table3_dose_by_strata.csv",          fn=out_tbl),
  list(f="variance_components.csv",            fn=out_mod),
  list(f="fixed_effects.csv",                  fn=out_mod),
  list(f="icc_results.csv",                    fn=out_mod),
  list(f="aim4_mor_icc_results.csv",           fn=out_mod),
  list(f="aim4_fixed_effects.csv",             fn=out_mod),
  list(f="aim4_subgroup_mor_results.csv",      fn=out_mod),
  list(f="time_trend_model_results.csv",       fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_rawmg_variance_components.csv",   fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_rawmg_fixed_effects.csv",         fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_rawmg_icc_results.csv",           fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_provider_fixed_lrt.csv",          fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_drug_choice_mor_icc.csv",         fn=out_mod),
  list(f="sa_drug_choice_fixed_effects.csv",   fn=out_mod),
  list(f="dose_distribution_percentiles.csv",  fn=out_fig),
  list(f="dose_decile_percentiles.csv",        fn=out_fig),
  list(f="annual_dose_trends.csv",             fn=out_fig),
  list(f="quarterly_dose_trends.csv",          fn=out_fig),
  list(f="drug_choice_by_year.csv",            fn=out_fig),
  list(f="drug_choice_by_quarter.csv",         fn=out_fig),
  list(f="dose_by_location.csv",               fn=out_fig),
  list(f="drug_choice_by_location.csv",        fn=out_fig),
  list(f="fig_dose_histogram.png",             fn=out_fig),
  list(f="fig_dose_tier_bar.png",              fn=out_fig),
  list(f="fig_annual_trends.png",              fn=out_fig),
  list(f="fig_variance_decomposition.png",     fn=out_fig)
)

checklist <- map_dfr(expected_files, function(item) {
  full_path <- item$fn(item$f)
  tibble(file = item$f, status = if (file.exists(full_path)) "OK" else "MISSING")
})

all_present <- all(checklist$status == "OK")
checklist %>% knitr::kable(caption=paste0("File checklist — ",
  if(all_present) "ALL FILES PRESENT" else "WARNING: MISSING FILES"))

if (all_present) {
  cat("\nAll expected files present. Please send output_to_share_6hr/ to coordinating center.\n")
} else {
  cat("\nWARNING: Missing files detected. Review errors above before submitting.\n")
}

cat("\n=======================================================\n")
cat("  RUN COMPLETE — v0.9_6hr\n")
cat("=======================================================\n")
cat("  Analytic cohort:", nrow(df), "encounters\n")
cat("    Etomidate:    ", sum(df$drug=="etomidate"), "\n")
cat("    Ketamine:     ", sum(df$drug=="ketamine"), "\n")
cat("  Hospitals:      ", n_hospitals, "(", n_hospitals_re, "meet RE threshold)\n")
cat("  Providers:      ", n_distinct(df$provider_id), "(", n_providers_re, "meet RE threshold)\n")
cat("  Imputation:     ", imputation_method, "\n")
cat("  Run completed:  ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"), "\n")
```

---

# Output File Summary

All files written to `output_to_share_6hr/` with prefix `SITE_ID_`. Return the entire folder to the coordinating center.

**Diagnostics:**
- `02_cohort_summary.csv` — merged QC + analytic cohort counts ⭐
- `01_missingness_raw.csv`, `02_missingness_analytic.csv` — missingness reports
- `01_impossible_values.csv`, `01_exclusion_waterfall.csv` — data quality
- `01_provider_encounter_dist.png`, `01_provider_encounter_table.csv` — provider structure
- `01_missing_weight.csv`, `02_derived_variable_checks.csv` — cohort checks
- `site_metadata.csv` — model types, versions, run info ⭐

**Tables:**
- `table1_by_drug.csv`, `table1_missingness.csv`, `table1_icu_type.csv` — Table 1
- `dose_tier_counts.csv`, `dose_categorical_counts.csv` — dose tier summaries
- `hospital_dose_summary.csv`, `provider_dose_summary.csv` — provider/hospital dose
- `03_provider_drug_choice_summary.csv` — provider drug preference
- `table3_dose_by_strata.csv` — dose by setting ⭐

**Models:**
- `variance_components.csv`, `fixed_effects.csv`, `icc_results.csv` — **primary result** ⭐
- `aim4_mor_icc_results.csv`, `aim4_fixed_effects.csv` — Aim 4 mOR ⭐
- `aim4_subgroup_mor_results.csv` — subgroup mOR (Figure 7 input)
- `time_trend_model_results.csv` — drug choice trend
- `sa_rawmg_*.csv`, `sa_provider_fixed_lrt.csv`, `sa_drug_choice_*.csv` — sensitivity analyses

**Figures (CSVs + PNGs):**
- `dose_distribution_percentiles.csv`, `dose_decile_percentiles.csv` — for pooled histograms
- `annual_dose_trends.csv`, `drug_choice_by_year.csv`, etc. — for pooled trend figures
- `fig_dose_histogram.png`, `fig_dose_tier_bar.png`, `fig_annual_trends.png`, `fig_variance_decomposition.png` ⭐
